# songgeneration-mcp — Full LLM Context

## What It Is

songgeneration-mcp is a FastMCP 3.4+ server that generates music from text prompts. It tries 4 backends in order: Lyria 3 Pro (Vertex AI) → Stable Audio Open 1.0 (diffusers) → MusicGen-small (transformers) → Studio SG2 (local API).

## API

`POST /api/v1/generate` — `{"prompt": "...", "duration": 30}`

Returns `{"success": true, "file": "/tmp/...wav", "backend": "lyria|stableaudio|musicgen|studio", "model": "..."}`

## Backends

| Backend | Quality | Requires | First load |
|---------|---------|----------|------------|
| Lyria 3 Pro | Best | `GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT` | None (API) |
| Stable Audio Open 1.0 | Good (instrumentals) | `diffusers` | ~3GB |
| MusicGen-small | Fair | `transformers` | ~2GB |
| Studio SG2 | Variable | SongGeneration-Studio | ~5GB |

## Env Vars

| Var | Default | Description |
|-----|---------|-------------|
| `SONGGENERATION_STUDIO_URL` | `http://localhost:10930` | Studio API URL |
| `SONGGEN_STUDIO_DIR` | — | Studio install directory |
| `SONGGEN_LOG_BUFFER_LINES` | 500 | Log buffer size |
| `GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT` | — | GCP project for Lyria |

## Architecture

```
User → FastMCP/HTTP → songgeneration-mcp → Lyria / Stable Audio / MusicGen / Studio
                                              ↓
                                        WAV file → load to mixx-dj-mcp deck
```

## Install

```powershell
uv sync
uv run uvicorn songgeneration_mcp.server:app --port 10885
```
